items.name: SmoothConfig
items.desc: Parameters for the Smooth mode: a uniform, non-cascade transition.

fields.name: delay
desc: Fixed delay before the transition starts, in `ms`.
@default 0

items.name: RippleConfig
items.desc: Parameters for the Ripple mode: a symmetric cascade radiating outward from the active line.

fields.name: range
desc: Offset (in line units) at which the per-line delay saturates.
Lines with `|offset| >= range` all receive the maximum delay.
@default 5

fields.name: step
desc: Delay increment per offset unit, in `ms`; scales the cascade curve.
@default 40

items.name: DirectionalConfig
items.desc: Parameters for the Directional mode: played lines move first, upcoming lines follow.

fields.name: range
desc: Offset (in line units) at which the per-line delay saturates.
@default 5

fields.name: step
desc: Delay increment per offset unit, in `ms`.
@default 40

items.name: StaggerConfig
items.desc: Parameters for the Stagger mode: a linear, direction-sensitive stagger cascade (legacy).

fields.name: range
desc: Offset (in line units) at which the delay saturates.
@default 4

fields.name: step
desc: Delay increment per offset unit, in `ms`.
@default 50

items.name: AnimationConfig
items.desc: Transition animation used when the active line changes.

fields.name: mode
desc: Cascade mode distributing per-line transition delays.
- `0` — smooth (all lines move together, no cascade)
- `1` — ripple (symmetric cascade outward from the active line)
- `2` — directional (played lines move first, upcoming lines follow)
- `3` — stagger (legacy linear stagger; delay saturates at `range`)
@default 0

fields.name: duration
desc: Transition duration of each individual line, in `ms`.
In cascade modes the total visual length is roughly `duration + maxDelay`.
`0` snaps to the target without easing.
@default 500

fields.name: easing
desc: Easing curve for the transition.
Accepts `linear`, `ease`, `ease-in`, `ease-out`, `ease-in-out` or `cubic-bezier(x1, y1, x2, y2)`.
@default "ease"
@example "ease-in-out"
@example "cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)"

fields.name: smooth
desc: Smooth mode parameters.

fields.name: ripple
desc: Ripple mode parameters.

fields.name: directional
desc: Directional mode parameters.

fields.name: stagger
desc: Stagger mode parameters.

items.name: Root
items.desc: Viewport scrolling that follows the active line.

fields.name: anchor
desc: Vertical anchor of the active line inside the viewport,
as a ratio (`0`-`1`) of its height.
- `0.5` — keep the active line at the vertical center
- `0.3` — keep the active line closer to the top
@default 0.5

fields.name: animation
desc: Transition animation used when the active line changes.
